name: AppClose
keyWeaknesses: Free tier removed January 2026 - users feel 'strong-armed into paying'
Per-parent billing doubles the family cost
No Australian localisation or court export optimisation
headline: CoRaise vs AppClose: A Better Deal for Australian Families
description: AppClose removed its free tier in January 2026. Compare CoRaise - the Australian co-parenting platform with a permanent free plan, split billing, and court-ready exports.
whySwitchPoints: CoRaise has a permanent free tier - AppClose removed theirs in January 2026
Save over $200/year compared to AppClose's per-parent pricing
Split billing means one subscription covers both parents
Data hosted exclusively in Sydney, Australia
Built-in DV safety features that AppClose does not offer
Court-ready PDF exports with SHA-256 integrity verification

faq.question: Why did AppClose remove its free plan?
faq.answer: AppClose moved to a fully paid model in January 2026. Users who previously relied on the free tier were required to subscribe. CoRaise is committed to maintaining a permanent free plan with core co-parenting features.

faq.question: How much does CoRaise cost compared to AppClose?
faq.answer: AppClose costs approximately $336/year for both parents ($168/parent/year). CoRaise's Family plan is $120/year total for both parents, and the free tier is available permanently. That is a saving of over $200/year.

faq.question: Does AppClose have safety features for DV situations?
faq.answer: No. AppClose does not offer domestic violence safety features. CoRaise includes an emergency exit button, harassment detection, no typing indicators, hidden notification previews, block/restrict mode, and session timeouts - all designed to protect vulnerable users.

faq.question: Can I use AppClose records in an Australian court?
faq.answer: AppClose does not offer court-optimised exports for Australian family law. CoRaise generates PDF exports that comply with the Evidence Act 1995 (Cth), with SHA-256 integrity verification and a certificate of authenticity.

faq.question: Does CoRaise have location sharing like AppClose?
faq.answer: CoRaise does not currently offer location sharing. Our focus is on secure communication, calendar management, expense tracking, and court-ready record-keeping. Location sharing may be considered in future releases based on user feedback.
